title: build in mac os with failure "stat.Ctim undefined"
body:
go build ./cmd/podman      

```
# github.com/containers/podman/v3/libpod/network
libpod/network/netconflist.go:301:33: stat.Ctim undefined (type *syscall.Stat_t has no field or method Ctim)
```
OS Info:

ProductName:    macOS
ProductVersion: 11.2.3
BuildVersion:   20D91

go version go1.16.6 darwin/amd64

comments.body: Please use the makefile to build. You cannot build the local podman binary on macos, you have to set the correct build tags. Check out this document https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/build_osx.md.
